name: chart/combo-chart
description: Combination bar + line chart on shared or dual y-axes.

meta.name: ComboChart
meta.description: Combination bar + line chart on shared or dual y-axes.

props.name: secondAxis
props.description: Render line on a secondary right y-axis

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes, grid lines, or legend. For micro/inline charts.

examples.title: Basic combo chart
examples.code:
import { ComboChart } from '@cascade-ui/charts'

const bars = [{label:'Jan',value:100},{label:'Feb',value:120},{label:'Mar',value:90}]
const line = [{x:0,y:50},{x:1,y:70},{x:2,y:60}]
<ComboChart bars={bars} line={line} title="Sales vs Target" />

whenToUse: Overlaying two related metrics with different scales (e.g. volume bars + rate line)
Pairing categorical totals with a continuous trend on a dual y-axis
whenNotToUse: Both metrics share a scale and type — use BarChart or LineChart
More than two series of differing types — clarity breaks down

related.name: BarChart
related.reason: Use when all series are categorical comparisons

related.name: LineChart
related.reason: Use when all series are trends on one scale

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
